engine_label: Selenium headless Chrome (requests first, then browser if thin/error)

# Upcoming Events

### [27th Roboracer Autonomous Racing Competition at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2026)June 1-5, 2026Vienna, Austria](https://icra2026-race.roboracer.ai/registration.html)### [28th Roboracer Autonomous Racing Competition at the IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV 2026)June 22-25, 2026Detroit, MI, USA](https://iv2026-race.roboracer.ai/registration.html)### [29th Roboracer Autonomous Racing Competition at the International Federation of Automatic Control (IFAC 2026)August 24-27, 2026Busan, Republic of Korea](https://2026ifac-roboracer.com/en/registration.html)### [30th Roboracer Autonomous Racing Competition at the IEEE Vehicular Technology Conference (VTC 2026)Sep 6-9, 2026Boston, MA, USA](https://events.vtsociety.org/vtc2026-fall/)
